title: Squirrel Task State Machine
description: Defines all valid task states and legal transitions. No transition not listed here is permitted.

transitions.description: Execution lane picks up the task from the queue.
Lane finishes work, outputs are ready for validation.
Execution cannot continue due to missing dependency or external constraint.
Unrecoverable error during execution. Max retries exhausted.
Blocking condition cleared. Task re-enters the queue.
All success_criteria met. Receipt is produced.
Success criteria not met. Receipt records failure.
User or OpenClaw re-enqueues a failed task for another attempt.

rules.no_implicit_completion: A task cannot move to 'complete' without passing through 'validating'.
rules.no_skipping_states: Every transition must follow a defined path. No direct jumps.
rules.receipts_required: A task in 'complete' or 'failed' state must have a corresponding receipt in outbox/.
